title: おもいで色のローズヒップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho enjoyed spending the weekends at her grandma's home,
a remote place surrounded by all kinds of wild flora.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she studied magic under her grandmother, who lived a free
lifestyle befitting that of a great witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Well then, are you ready, Sweepy? Give it a try yourself—just like I
taught you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Grandma! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: "Gera, gera—uninium! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Nicely done. Now, you smell that? That sweet, flowery smell—it never
fails to bring a smile to this old lady's face.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Hey, you're right! Wowie, wow, I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that was a perfect display of herbal geranium magic. What's
more, this strong scent also drives away nasty pests.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
And that's not all—now we can make delicious herbal tea and jam,
too! Come here Sweepy, help me carry these.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay! Hehe, "gera, gera, uninium! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Wowie! Magic is so super fun! I wanna do more... There's gotta be
sooo many more spells I can learn!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Grandma! You see, I wanna learn a lot, lot more magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So I was wondering, what's the bestest, most amazingest spell you've
ever cast?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: My best spell, you say? Let me think...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: ...It would have to be racing magic, no doubt about it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
The racing scene is special, you see. You'll find all kinds of
spells—some that'll make you jump for joy, others that'll make your
heart flutter... or even feel sad.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But you know, there's a one-of-a-kind magic that can only be used
there. Back when I used to race in my younger days, I found and
learned that magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
My little Sweepy. I hope that one day, you too will learn to wield that
very same magic...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
And when you do, I believe you'll finally find the "fun" you've been
looking for—and it'll be better than you could ever imagine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then what are we waiting for?! I wanna race too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And then, just like Grandma, I'll show everyone the most amazingest
magic in the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! How about that—I'm looking forward to seeing just what
kind of magic you'll use.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Magic is fun. With it, everything that bores me gets blown away.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to learn more magic like that, so I came to Tracen Academy
to look for this racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how much I run, I can't find it anywhere! And the
teachers and instructors are always getting on my case and telling me
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So I've had it! This isn't fun at all! It's boring! Everything is sooo
boring now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Maybe I should just... quit racing.
choice_data_list: But that would be such a waste!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I blurt that out before I can stop myself. After all, the image of her
comeback in that scrimmage is still freshly seared into my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And besides, after hearing that story of hers, I feel like I understand
what her grandmother was thinking back then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She exceeded in so many different areas, but none of them were fun
for her. Because all those activities weren't what she really wanted to
do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's important is whether or not she wants to do something. That's
why her grandmother showed her magic. She gave Sweep the
motivation she needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho made the decision by herself to enter the racing scene.
She did it because she wanted to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only person who can brighten up her life, who can make it
exciting—is herself. But if she's having trouble taking the next step
alone, then...
choice_data_list:
Are you really going to give up on racing
magic?

Are you really going to give up on racing
magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Of course not, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's the best magic there is! And I, Sweepy, will one day
become a great witch fit to wield that power!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...And y'know, I promised her. I promised Grandma that I would learn
racing magic!
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, it's you.
If anyone can do it, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her with complete and utter confidence. Because there's no
doubt in my mind that—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I say this sincerely because I saw it with my own two eyes. Because I
want the magical girl in front of me to never stop believing in magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because I hope that this seed of potential can sprout amid adversity
into a beautiful blossom.
choice_data_list:
Do you want to see what the world of racing
truly has to offer?

Do you want to see what the world of racing
truly has to offer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: The world of racing? Can I find the magic I'm looking for there?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then from today on, you're my familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You don't even know what a familiar is? What a dummy. A familiar is
always by their magical girl's side and helps them with aaall kinds of
things!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Until I learn racing magic, you're sticking it out with me! Got it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, familiar! I know you heard me, so give me an answer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: How did things end up like this?!
